title: Oh Oh Nadhigal Oda Lyrics Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Oh Oh Nadhigal Oda
Singer(s): Naresh Iyer, Shreya Ghoshal
Movie: Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham
Music: Siddharth Vipin
Lyricist: Na MuthuKumar

Railaada iddhayam aada
rathiriyil indhayam aada.
maram yaavum pinaal oda
nenjil indha payanam neelum.

Kaal aada kolusum aada
kadhoram kammal aada.
Kannoram indha kanavugal oda
nenjil indha payanam vazhum.

Edhire pogum megamaey
yaar unnai panjil seidhadhu.
Kan simittum vinmeeney adadaaa
neeyum thooramey yaar unnai
vinnil vaithaadhu.
nilavai pidikkudhey.

Oh Oh sedigal oda
oh oh kodigal oda
oh oh malargal oda
manadhum oda oo..oh...

Oh Oh Nadhigal Oda
oh oh malaigal oda
oh oh iravum oda
ulagamum oda ohhh....

Vazhakai enbadhu thodarum payanamthaan
palagum nimidam thaan.
Nam kavalai yaavum vazhiyil maarum.

Indha padhaithaan innum neelaadhaa.
inbam thodaraadhaa.
aanaalaum kaalam kailai saattum.

Vaanavil ponaalum vannangal
nam vizhigalil ennalum vazhaaladhaa..
oru naalil iththanai inbangal ennodu
idhu podhum podhumey eppodhum.

Oh Oh sedigal oda
oh oh kodigal oda
oh oh malargal oda
manadhum oda oo..oh...

Oh Oh Nadhigal Oda
oh oh malaigal oda
oh oh iravum oda
ulagamum oda ohhh....

Idha tharunanthai viumbum idhayamthaan
kattril parandhaen naan.
Unnaale iravil meley ponen.

Endrum thanimayil vazhndhu vandhen naan
enna kandaen naan.
unnaale meendum malalai aanen.

Oru naalil eththanai nyabagam nenjodu
idhu podhum podhumey eppodhum.

Oh Oh sedigal oda
oh oh kodigal oda
oh oh malargal oda
manadhum oda oo..oh...

Oh Oh Nadhigal Oda
oh oh malaigal oda
oh oh iravum oda
ulagamum oda ohhh....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth and love.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham, this song highlights moments of happiness and connection between the characters, enhancing the film's light-hearted theme.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Naresh Iyer and Shreya Ghoshal.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Oh Oh Nadhigal Oda was composed by Siddharth Vipin.

When was this song released?

This song was released on April 18, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oh Oh Nadhigal Oda, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the joyous moments shared between characters in Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham. The playful lyrics by Na Muthukumar, combined with the lively duet by Naresh Iyer and Shreya Ghoshal, evoke a sense of celebration and youthful exuberance. This melody serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of happiness and connection, making it a delightful addition to any festive occasion. The song's upbeat tempo and cheerful vibe resonate with listeners, inviting them to join in the celebration of life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Oh Nadhigal Oda from Vallavanukku Pullum Aayudham is a vibrant celebration of life and love, brought to life by the enchanting voices of Naresh Iyer and Shreya Ghoshal. With Siddharth Vipin's catchy composition and Na Muthukumar's playful lyrics, this song perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. Get ready to groove to this upbeat melody that promises to elevate your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: In the night, the heart dances, and the trees also sway. This journey flows in my heart like a river.
The feet dance, the stories unfold. These dreams live in my heart like a journey.
Who has made you cry in the clouds that are passing by? Who has placed you in the sky like a star? You hold on to the moon.
Oh oh, with the sounds, oh oh, with the colors, oh oh, with the flowers, the heart also flows, oo..oh...
Oh oh, with the sounds, oh oh, with the mountains, oh oh, with the night and the world, ohhh....
Life is a continuous journey, and every moment is a part of it. Our worries will change along the way.
Is this creation still blue? Is happiness still flowing? But time will eventually take its toll.
Even if the sky fades, the colors will still shine in our eyes. One day, all these joys will be enough for me, always.
Oh oh, with the sounds, oh oh, with the colors, oh oh, with the flowers, the heart also flows, oo..oh...
Oh oh, with the sounds, oh oh, with the mountains, oh oh, with the night and the world, ohhh....
I have fallen into the heart that blooms with youth. Because of you, I have risen above the darkness.
I have come alone and found myself in solitude. Because of you, I have become a flower again.
Now, stop and listen to what I say, and then speak.
One day, how many memories will this heart hold? This is enough, always.
Oh oh, with the sounds, oh oh, with the colors, oh oh, with the flowers, the heart also flows, oo..oh...
Oh oh, with the sounds, oh oh, with the mountains, oh oh, with the night and the world, ohhh....
